## Kernel Name
e.g., vibegemm_h100_wgmma

e.g., VibeHPC

## GPU
e.g., H100, A100

## Precision
e.g., FP16, BF16, FP32

## GEMM Shape
Format: M×N×K  
e.g., 8192×8192×8192

## Performance

- TFLOPS:
- % of cuBLAS:

## Source Code

GitHub repo link:
https://github.com/...

## Compile Command

```bash
nvcc -O3 ...

## Run Command

```bash
./run.sh ...
